params.value: SELECT OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, CloseDate, AccountId, Account.Name FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND Owner.GTM_Motion_User__c IN ('Subscription Expansion', 'Subscription Retention') ORDER BY Owner.Name LIMIT 500
